--- alter_table_add_column_with_default_on_update.sql
ALTER TABLE foo ADD COLUMN bar TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (pending_commit_timestamp()) ON UPDATE (pending_commit_timestamp())
--- AST
&ast.AlterTable{
  Name: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  TableAlteration: &ast.AddColumn{
    Add:    16,
    Column: &ast.ColumnDef{
      Null: 45,
      Key:  -1,
      Name: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 27,
        NameEnd: 30,
        Name:    "bar",
      },
      Type: &ast.ScalarSchemaType{
        NamePos: 31,
        Name:    "TIMESTAMP",
      },
      NotNull:          true,
      DefaultSemantics: &ast.ColumnDefaultExpr{
        Default: 50,
        Rparen:  85,
        Expr:    &ast.CallExpr{
          Rparen: 84,
          Func:   &ast.Path{
            Idents: []*ast.Ident{
              &ast.Ident{
                NamePos: 59,
                NameEnd: 83,
                Name:    "pending_commit_timestamp",
              },
            },
          },
        },
        OnUpdate: &ast.OnUpdate{
          On:     87,
          Rparen: 124,
          Expr:   &ast.CallExpr{
            Rparen: 123,
            Func:   &ast.Path{
              Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 98,
                  NameEnd: 122,
                  Name:    "pending_commit_timestamp",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      Hidden: -1,
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
ALTER TABLE foo ADD COLUMN bar TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT (pending_commit_timestamp()) ON UPDATE (pending_commit_timestamp())
